get.summary: Get addresses that are bound to the specific profileId

parameters.name: profileId
parameters.description: Unique identifier with a length of 66 characters

201.description: The addresses that are bound to the speicifc profileId

post.summary: Request bind between profile of two addresses
post.description:
Request for message to bind profile that is belong to the two addresses
All profiles under the addresses will be bound and new profile will be generated.

requestBody.description: The two addresses that are required to be bind.

201.description: The messages that is required to be signed by each of the address

requestBody.description: Messages and its signatures that is used for verification

201.description: The profileId that all the addresses have been bind into.

post.summary: Request to remove bind of an address from a profile

requestBody.description: The address that is required to be removed from the bind of the profileId.

201.description: The messages that is required to be signed by each of the address

requestBody.description: Messages and its signatures that is used for verification

201.description: The new profileId that is being generated for this address.

info.title: Auth API
info.description: API that provides authentication services for dapps.

domain.description: RFC 4501 dns authority that is requesting the signing.

statement.description:
Human-readable ASCII assertion that the user will sign, and it must not contain `
`.

uri.description: RFC 3986 URI referring to the resource that is the subject of the signing (as in the __subject__ of a claim).

expirationTime.description: ISO 8601 datetime string that, if present, indicates when the signed authentication message is no longer valid.

notBefore.description: ISO 8601 datetime string that, if present, indicates when the signed authentication message will become valid.

resources.description: List of information or references to information the user wishes to have resolved as part of authentication by the relying party. They are expressed as RFC 3986 URIs separated by new lines.

timeout.description: Time in seconds before the challenge is expired
